nodes.Company Description: A multinational technology company that designs, manufactures, and markets smartphones, personal computers, tablets, wearables, and accessories.

nodes.Company Name: Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd. (Foxconn)
nodes.Company Description: The world's largest contract electronics manufacturer and a primary assembler for Apple's iPhone and iPad lines.
A global leader in memory chips, display panels, and electronic components essential for smartphone and computer assembly.
The world's largest dedicated independent semiconductor foundry, producing chips designed by Foxconn's clients like Apple and Nvidia.
A leading manufacturer of ceramic passive electronic components, focusing on capacitors and filter products.
Leading manufacturer of photolithography systems used to etch circuit patterns onto silicon wafers.
Provider of materials engineering solutions used to produce chips and advanced displays.
A major supplier of high-purity silicon wafers and photoresist materials used in semiconductor fabrication.
A leading global high-tech company specializing in the R&D and manufacturing of acoustic, optical, and precision components.
A market leader and global supplier of advanced micro-acoustic, audio processing, and precision device solutions.
An American multinational corporation that creates semiconductors, software, and services related to wireless technology.
